svg.title: Call Center module — recommended release sequence
svg.desc: Product release plan for the Infath Contact Center module. Critical path is Inc 1 Voice Engine Spine. Release 1 is the golden-path walking skeleton threading one call through IVR, routing, desktop, recording, wrap, and ticket/CSAT. Release 2 deepens supervisor, recording, routing and dashboards. Release 3 completes parity with omnichannel, WFM, outbound and self-service. Inc 12 governance/RBAC/audit is cross-cutting and built now. AI overlays predictive routing, voicebot containment, copilot and predictive engagement.

g.text: live call session + event bus — everything else parallels or gates here

svg.text: one real call through every seam

g.text: build now — gates and governs every increment
